text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That's weird! I've been working on using my
diaphragm, but my voice isn't coming out right...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Darn it. I won't be able to cheer anyone up with
such a weak voice!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Well... It doesn't seem like my singing voice is
improving very much. I can't seem to put any
oomph into it.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Argh, I can't lose spirit this easily! I'm going to try
singing from my diaphragm again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to be suffering from fatigue. We may
need to rethink her race schedule.
